---
applyTo: '**/*.css'
---
# CSS Instructions

- Keep shared visual tokens in `:root` using semantic custom property names.
- Reuse existing colors, spacing, radii, and border tokens before adding new constants.
- Keep property ordering readable and consistent across rules.
- Prefer component styles that reference shared tokens instead of hard-coded color literals.
- Keep styling in CSS rather than inline attributes or JavaScript-generated style constants where possible.
